allow: Bash(git push origin main feature/dashboard-overview-improvements replit-agent)

Bash(python3 -c "
lines = open\('/home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/tender-details.tsx'\).readlines\(\)
with open\('/home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/tender-details.tsx', 'w'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(lines[:1472]\)
print\('Done, file now has', len\(lines[:1472]\), 'lines'\)
")

Bash(for file in client/src/components/navbar.tsx client/src/components/create-tender-modal.tsx client/src/components/tender-card.tsx client/src/components/submit-offer-modal.tsx; do
  if grep -q "useI18n" "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file: HAS useI18n"
  else
    echo "$file: NO useI18n"
  fi
done)

Bash(cat << 'EOF'

## SUMMARY OF FILES WITHOUT useI18n HOOK

The following files have hardcoded English strings that need to be translated:

### ADMIN PAGES \(All Missing useI18n\):
1. AdminDashboard.tsx - Admin panel dashboard
2. AdminUsers.tsx - User management  
3. AdminVendors.tsx - Vendor verification
4. AdminJoinRequests.tsx - Join request management
5. AdminAwards.tsx - Awards management
6. AdminAuditLogs.tsx - Audit log viewer

### TENDER/FORM PAGES \(All Missing useI18n\):
1. TenderFormBuilder.tsx - Form structure builder
2. TenderBriefStep.tsx - Tender brief step
3. TenderInviteLink.tsx - Tender invitation links
4. CreateTender.tsx - Create tender form
5. invitation-links.tsx - Invitation links page

### KEY COMPONENTS \(Missing useI18n\):
1. navbar.tsx - Main navigation
2. create-tender-modal.tsx - Modal for creating tenders
3. submit-offer-modal.tsx - Modal for submitting offers
4. tender-card.tsx - Tender card component
5. Other utility components

EOF)
Bash(sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/translate -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"texts":["مرحبا بالعالم"],"targetLanguage":"en"}' 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "import\('pdf-parse'\).then\(m => { const keys = Object.keys\(m\); console.log\(keys.slice\(0, 20\)\); console.log\('has PDFParse:', 'PDFParse' in m\); console.log\('has default:', 'default' in m\); }\)" 2>&1)
Bash(timeout 15 npm run dev 2>&1 | tail -20 || true)
Bash(lsof -ti:5000 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo "Port cleared")
Bash(fuser -k 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; fuser 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null && echo "still in use" || echo "port free")
Bash(fuser -k 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f "tsx server" 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f "node.*vite" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; fuser 5000/tcp 2>/dev/null && echo "STILL IN USE" || echo "Port 5000 is free")
Bash(timeout 15 npx tsx server/index.ts 2>&1 | head -30 || true)
